text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not long before Admire Vega runs in the Hopeful
Stakes, Narita Top Road narrowly loses in her
own debut race, despite being the favorite to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega, who herself recently rose to the top
of a pre-race popularity poll, is asked by Top
Road if she ever feels pressured by the
expectations of fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega answers that she's determined to
carry the burden she took on, and that resolve is
what prevents her from wavering.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her heart full of that same resolve, Admire Vega
heads into the Hopeful Stakes.
